mapper.select: SELECT HD.BID_NUM , HD.BID_CNT ,(SELECT MAX(BID_CNT) FROM STOCBDHD WHERE GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = HD.BUYER_CD AND BID_NUM = HD.BID_NUM AND BID_CNT < HD.BID_CNT AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS PRE_BID_CNT FROM STOCBDHD HD WHERE HD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND HD.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND HD.APP_DOC_NUM = #{APP_DOC_NUM} AND HD.APP_DOC_CNT = #{APP_DOC_CNT} AND HD.DEL_FLAG = '0'

SELECT CUST.IRS_NUM AS CORP_NO , CVUR.DEPT_CD AS BRC ,(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS APLY_DT , BDHD.REG_USER_ID AS USER_ID , 'SMS_BID' '@@' BDHD.GATE_CD '@@' BDHD.BUYER_CD '@@' BDHD.BID_NUM '@@' BDHD.BID_CNT AS CONT_TBL_PK , NULL AS FILE_SIZE FROM STOCBDHD BDHD JOIN STOCCUST CUST ON (BDHD.GATE_CD = CUST.GATE_CD AND BDHD.BUYER_CD = CUST.CUST_CD) JOIN STOCCVUR CVUR ON (BDHD.GATE_CD = CVUR.GATE_CD AND BDHD.REG_USER_ID = CVUR.USER_ID) WHERE BDHD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BDHD.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND BDHD.BID_NUM = #{BID_NUM} AND BDHD.BID_CNT = #{BID_CNT}

SELECT HD.ANN_ITEM , AP.VENDOR_CD AS RECV_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(AP.GATE_CD, AP.REG_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS RECV_USER_NM , VNGL.VENDOR_NM ,GETCOMPANYNAME(HD.GATE_CD, (SELECT MAX(DT.PR_BUYER_CD) FROM STOCBDDT DT WHERE DT.GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND DT.BUYER_CD = HD.BUYER_CD AND DT.BID_NUM = HD.BID_NUM AND DT.BID_CNT = HD.BID_CNT AND DT.DEL_FLAG = '0'), #{ses.langCd}) AS PR_BUYER_NM , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(HD.ANN_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS ANN_FROM_DATE ,(CASE WHEN TO_DATE(HD.APP_BEGIN_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') - 1 < TO_DATE(HD.ANN_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') THEN TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(HD.ANN_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') ELSE TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(HD.APP_BEGIN_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') - 1, 'YYYY-MM-DD') END) AS ANN_TO_DATE , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(HD.APP_END_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS APP_END_DATE ,GETCOMCODE(HD.GATE_CD, 'M301', HD.CONT_TYPE1, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS CONT_TYPE1_LOC ,GETCOMCODE(HD.GATE_CD, 'M302', HD.CONT_TYPE2, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS CONT_TYPE2_LOC FROM STOCBDHD HD JOIN STOCBDAP AP ON (HD.GATE_CD = AP.GATE_CD AND HD.BUYER_CD = AP.BUYER_CD AND HD.BID_NUM = AP.BID_NUM AND HD.BID_CNT = AP.BID_CNT AND AP.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCVNGL VNGL ON (AP.GATE_CD = VNGL.GATE_CD AND AP.VENDOR_CD = VNGL.VENDOR_CD) WHERE HD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND HD.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND HD.BID_NUM = #{BID_NUM} AND HD.BID_CNT = #{BID_CNT}

SELECT HD.ANN_ITEM , AP.VENDOR_CD AS RECV_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(AP.GATE_CD, AP.REG_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS RECV_USER_NM ,(SELECT VENDOR_NM FROM STOCVNGL WHERE GATE_CD = AP.GATE_CD AND VENDOR_CD = AP.VENDOR_CD) AS VENDOR_NM ,GETCOMPANYNAME(HD.GATE_CD, (SELECT MAX(DT.PR_BUYER_CD) FROM STOCBDDT DT WHERE DT.GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND DT.BUYER_CD = HD.BUYER_CD AND DT.BID_NUM = HD.BID_NUM AND DT.BID_CNT = HD.BID_CNT AND DT.DEL_FLAG = '0'), #{ses.langCd}) AS PR_BUYER_NM , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(HD.ANN_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS ANN_FROM_DATE ,(CASE WHEN TO_DATE(HD.APP_BEGIN_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') - 1 < TO_DATE(HD.ANN_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') THEN TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(HD.ANN_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') ELSE TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(HD.APP_BEGIN_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') - 1, 'YYYY-MM-DD') END) AS ANN_TO_DATE , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(HD.APP_END_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS APP_END_DATE ,GETCOMCODE(HD.GATE_CD, 'M301', HD.CONT_TYPE1, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS CONT_TYPE1_LOC ,GETCOMCODE(HD.GATE_CD, 'M302', HD.CONT_TYPE2, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS CONT_TYPE2_LOC , TO_CHAR(VO.BID_RANK) AS BID_RANK ,(CASE WHEN VO.BID_STATUS IS NOT NULL THEN VO.BID_STATUS ELSE (CASE WHEN (GETDECPERSONALINFO(SP.TECH_SCORE), 0) < (HD.MIN_TECH_SCORE, 0) OR (SP.PRC_SCORE, 0) + (GETDECPERSONALINFO(SP.TECH_SCORE), 0) < (HD.MIN_TOT_SCORE, 0) THEN '600' ELSE (CASE WHEN ((AP.FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600' OR (AP.EV_FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600') THEN '600' ELSE '100' END) END) END) AS BID_STATUS ,(SELECT listagg( GETCOMPANYNAME(GATE_CD, COMPANY_CD, #{ses.langCd}) ' ' GETDEPTNAME(GATE_CD, COMPANY_CD, DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) ' ' DUTY_NM ' ' GETDECPERSONALINFO(USER_NM) ' ' '(' GETDECPERSONALINFO(TEL_NUM) ')' ,'MAKEBR') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY USER_NM) AS PR_USER_TEXT FROM STOCCVUR WHERE GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND USER_ID IN (SELECT REG_USER_ID FROM STOCPRHD WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND (BUYER_CD, PR_NUM) IN (SELECT DISTINCT PB_BUYER_CD, PR_NUM FROM STOCBDDT B WHERE B.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND B.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND B.BID_NUM = #{BID_NUM} AND B.BID_CNT = #{BID_CNT}))) AS PR_USER_TEXT -- 사업내용관련문의(=기술협상담당자) ,(SELECT GETCOMPANYNAME(GATE_CD, COMPANY_CD, #{ses.langCd}) ' ' GETDEPTNAME(GATE_CD, COMPANY_CD, DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) ' ' DUTY_NM ' ' GETDECPERSONALINFO(USER_NM) ' ' '(' GETDECPERSONALINFO(TEL_NUM) ')' AS BID_USER_TEXT FROM STOCCVUR WHERE GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND USER_ID = HD.BID_USER_ID) AS BID_USER_TEXT -- 입찰사무관련문의(=가격협상담당자) , TO_CHAR(HD.NEGO_START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS NEGO_START_DATE , TO_CHAR(HD.NEGO_END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS NEGO_END_DATE -- 2021.06.30 : 우선협상대상자 선정 SMS 수수료 추가 ,(SELECT IRS_NUM FROM STOCCUST WHERE GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND CUST_CD = HD.BUYER_CD) AS CORP_NO ,(SELECT DEPT_CD FROM STOCCVUR WHERE GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND USER_ID = HD.BID_USER_ID) AS BRC ,(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS APLY_DT , HD.BID_USER_ID AS USER_ID , 'SMS_NEGO' '@@' HD.GATE_CD '@@' HD.BUYER_CD '@@' HD.BID_NUM '@@' HD.BID_CNT '@@' VO.VOTE_CNT '@@' VO.VENDOR_CD AS CONT_TBL_PK , NULL AS FILE_SIZE FROM STOCBDHD HD JOIN STOCBDAP AP ON (AP.GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND AP.BUYER_CD = HD.BUYER_CD AND AP.BID_NUM = HD.BID_NUM AND AP.BID_CNT = HD.BID_CNT AND AP.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCBDVO VO ON (VO.GATE_CD = AP.GATE_CD AND VO.BUYER_CD = AP.BUYER_CD AND VO.BID_NUM = AP.BID_NUM AND VO.BID_CNT = AP.BID_CNT AND VO.VENDOR_CD= AP.VENDOR_CD AND VO.VOTE_CNT = (SELECT MAX(VOTE_CNT) FROM STOCBDVO WHERE GATE_CD = VO.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = VO.BUYER_CD AND BID_NUM = VO.BID_NUM AND BID_CNT = VO.BID_CNT AND VENDOR_CD= VO.VENDOR_CD AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AND VO.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCBDSP SP ON (SP.GATE_CD = VO.GATE_CD AND SP.BUYER_CD = VO.BUYER_CD AND SP.BID_NUM = VO.BID_NUM AND SP.BID_CNT = VO.BID_CNT AND SP.VOTE_CNT = VO.VOTE_CNT AND SP.VENDOR_CD = VO.VENDOR_CD AND SP.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE HD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND HD.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND HD.BID_NUM = #{BID_NUM} AND HD.BID_CNT = #{BID_CNT} ORDER BY VO.BID_RANK
